title: DELILA-Rust channel descriptor (chSettings.json)
description: Pure hardware descriptor: location, tags, calibration polynomial. Phase J (SPEC v0.7) removed the legacy trigger/AC/threshold fields; the unused `ID` was dropped in v0.7.1. EB lookup uses `(Module, Channel)` as the key. Format: array of modules, each module is an array of channels.

ChSettings.description: One channel descriptor. PascalCase keys for ELIFANT-Event compatibility.

DetectorType.description: Free-form detector type label (HPGe / Si / AC / PMT / ...). Documentation only — does not affect EB behaviour.

Tags.description: Tags used by L2 `counter` ops to select this channel's hits. Choose names that match the strings you'll use in eb_config.json L2 ops (e.g. "HPGe", "E_Sector", "dE_Sector").

p0.description: Energy calibration constant term: E = p0 + p1·ADC + p2·ADC² + p3·ADC³.
